profile.name: HARSHVARDHAN PATIL
profile.tagline: I build things that live on the internet.
profile.about: I enjoy building software, exploring new technologies, and constantly learning through experiments. Alongside preparing for NEET, I spend my free time coding, diving into cyberworld, and creating fun projects like this portfolio. Outside of tech, I'm passionate about photography, trekking, art, and nature. I'm always excited to learn, create, and challenge myself.

projects.title: Retro Terminal Portfolio
projects.description: A CRT-themed personal site with a talking sidekick and a working fake terminal. Yes, this one.

points: Directed short films from concept development to final production.
Collaborated with cinematographers, editors, and actors to achieve a cohesive visual style.
Planned storyboards, shot compositions, and scene blocking for cinematic storytelling.
Managed production schedules and ensured projects were delivered on time.
Developed public speaking and confident communication skills through regular presentations.
Strengthened leadership, teamwork, and problem-solving abilities in group activities.
Participated in personality development workshops focused on confidence and interpersonal skills.
Improved time management, active listening, and effective communication.
Built and maintained REST APIs in Node.js

character.name: PIXEL
character.greeting: Click me for a random tip!
dialogs: Psst. Hey. Yeah you. Scroll down, there's cool stuff.
Did you know? This whole site is powered by a single JSON file.
Try the terminal below. Type 'help' if you're lost.
404 jokes not found. Please insert coin to continue.
I used to be a real boy. Now I'm just div soup.
Fun fact: there are two spinning loaders in this app pretending to be one.
Warning: staring at retro UIs for too long may cause nostalgia.
Click around, I don't judge. Much.
You've clicked me {count} times. Get a hobby. Or don't, I'm not your mom.
Loading personality... 100% complete. This is it. This is all of it.

commands.help: Available commands: help, about, skills, projects, contact, resume, whoami, sudo, date, clear, echo, coffee
commands.whoami: guest — you're just visiting, but you're welcome here.
commands.skills: JavaScript, TypeScript, React, Node.js, Python, and enough CSS to be dangerous.
commands.projects: Run 'projects' anytime to be reminded to scroll up and look — there's a whole section for that.
commands.contact: Email 08harshvardhan03@gmail.com or use the links in the header.
commands.resume: Scroll to the resume section, or click download there.
commands.sudo: Nice try. Permission denied: you are not in the sudoers file. This incident will be reported.
commands.date: It is currently a great day to check out this portfolio.
commands.hello: Hey there! Thanks for stopping by.
commands.matrix: Wake up, Neo... just kidding, this is a portfolio, not a simulation. Or is it?

terminal.unknownCommandMessage: command not found: {cmd} — type 'help' for a list of commands
